datasets.description: Regression baseline captured directly by running the current, unmodified src/js/engine/duval.js#calcDuval on the input below. NOT sourced from a published standard — do not cite this as a standards-conformance example. Its only purpose is to detect unintended changes to engine output between code revisions.
Regression baseline (engine-snapshot, not a standards example) — an elevated-gas case exercising the DT (mixed thermal + electrical) zone boundary.
